name: on fct_Calling
title: on fct_Calling
description: The event procedure is called when a service function is about to be called at a provider. At this time, the automatic answering feature has not yet set out parameters or delay, so you can still use the ParamDefaults or DefaultResult values to configure it.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
